name: Cisco Systems
analysis: CSCO has all Fibonacci EMAs in full bullish alignment. Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 21 EMA at $118.0262. Risk/reward is 0.49:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
